series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to: hiring materials and posting files for unsuccessful applicants; contingent workforce records; workforce development; health, safety and incident records; internal investigations; civil rights and Title VII records; requests for outside agency to investigate; employee training records; tuition reimbursement and other education assistance; discipline and grievance records; other operational records.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: period specified electronic format ; Electronic: two (2) years from record date or date of final disposition of an action (if applicable) NOTE: In event that collective bargaining agreement specifies retention and record storage obligations that differ from obligations set forth in this schedule, terms in collective bargaining agreement shall take precedence over this schedule. Refer terms of current agreement and applicable OAC provisions. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
